text: Standing amidst this modern, glass-walled meeting room and then before the vibrant R+D exhibit, I feel suspended between utility and aspiration. The clean, purposeful design around me encourages innovation but also whispers of the orderliness that can constrain creativity. In the exhibit, the interplay of technology and text draws me to contemplate our drive to connect intellect with imagination. Here, surrounded by artifacts of progress, I am both curious and slightly displaced, questioning how I fit into a world shaped by relentless development.
